title: AgenticIoTSecurityTools
description: Canonical tool schemas used across the prompts in this repository. Each entry is a function-calling object compatible with OpenAI/Anthropic tool-use conventions.

tools.name: siem_query
tools.description: Issue a SPL-like query against the SIEM and receive matching events.

tools.name: attack_lookup
tools.description: Resolve a MITRE ATT&CK technique ID to its full description and detection guidance.

tools.name: device_inventory
tools.description: Look up an asset by IP or MAC and return device class, criticality tier, and patch status.

tools.name: pcap_sandbox
tools.description: Run a small packet capture filter against a recorded session in a sandbox.

tools.name: cti_feed
tools.description: Search threat intelligence feeds for indicators related to a hash, domain, or IP.

tools.name: rate_limit
tools.description: Apply a packets-per-second cap to a given source IP for a bounded TTL.

tools.name: block_ip
tools.description: Drop traffic from a source IP. Requires confirmation for life-critical assets.

tools.name: quarantine_device
tools.description: Move a device to a quarantine VLAN. MUST require human approval for tier <=2 devices.

tools.name: static_analyzer
tools.description: Run a lightweight static-analysis pass on a firmware file or source tree.

tools.name: taint_tracer
tools.description: Trace data flow from a source expression to a sink expression in a firmware artifact.

tools.name: protocol_fuzzer
tools.description: Send fuzzed protocol inputs to a sandboxed target and report crashes/anomalies.

tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Search NVD for CVEs matching a vendor, product, and version.
